title: Certification
description: A confirmation that the product meets the requirements of a specific standard or regulation.

name.description: The name of the certification (e.g., 'OEKO-TEX Standard 100').

identifier.description: The unique certificate number or ID.

url.description: A web-page representation or registry link (e.g., EPREL cert page).

certificationBodyRole.description: The role or capacity of the certifying body.

document.description: An optional digital document (like a PDF) of the certification.
